evidence: "One of THE best shows ever made! If you want to laugh and cry..."
"A solid, quiet mystery that is as comfortable as a tea cozy."
"Overrated and a bit weird - what am I missing? - it's worth the time if you can watch a movie that does not makes sense."
"The ending will launch many a discussion, so for me it was worth the watch!"
"This is the BEST movie I've seen in years - truly riveting from start to finish!"
"BEST - SHOW - EVER!!! The equivalent of crack cocaine for the mind - totally BING-WORTHY!"
"Heart pounding - excellent movie that exceeded my already high expectations!"
"Heartrendingly beautiful, this episode was note perfect."
"As an author of over thirty books, it's hard for me to not guess every plot twist and turn."
"A movie to make you laugh while you think - an excellent movie that you'll want to watch more than once!"
"This show is so beautifully acted, tightly written and EXCITING that you truly can't stop watching!!!"
"A perfect goodbye... We, the viewers, share your pain."
"This is a brilliant movie that, like a well-worn hat, just gets better the more you wear/see it."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fast-paced comedies and dramas that evoke deep emotional responses. They appreciate high production quality and enjoy narratives that are engaging, though they have mixed feelings about complex storylines.
